arabicText: تُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ مِنْ قَبْلِ زَوَالِ الْعُمْرِ وَانْتِهَاءِ الْأَجَلِ
latinTransliteration: Tub ilā Rabbika min qabli zawālil-‘umri wa-ntihā'il-ajal
englishTranslation: Repent to your Lord before the end of lifespan and the arrival of your term.
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom bala dundug di jex ak sa bisu dee di wàcc.
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ بَلَ دُنْدُجْ دِ جِخْ اَكْ سَ بِسُ دِ دِ وَّسْ

arabicText: وَلَا تَغْتَرَّ بِالْمَظَاهِرِ الْفَانِيَةِ فَالدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ
latinTransliteration: Wa lā taghtarra bil-maẓāhiril-fāniyati fad-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥad
englishTranslation: Do not be deceived by vanishing appearances, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone.
wolofTranslationStandard: Bul xool dundug àdduna buy seey, ndax kenn du fi yàgg sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: بُلْ خُولْ دُنْدُجْ اَدُّنَ بُيْ سِي نْدَخْ كِنْ دُ فِ يَقْ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ خَوْفَكَ مِنَ الْجَلِيلِ حِصْنًا لَكَ مِنَ الْآثَامِ وَالْمَعَاصِي
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al khawfaka minal-Jalīli ḥiṣnan laka minal-āthāmi wal-ma‘āṣī
englishTranslation: And make your fear of the Majestic a fortress for you against sins and transgressions.
wolofTranslationStandard: Defal ragal Yàlla mu kawe ma ab gaar buy fadd say bàkkar.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِفَلْ رَجَلْ يَࣺلَّ مُ كَوِ مَ اَبْ جَارْ بُيْ فَدْ سَيْ بَࣺكَّرْ

arabicText: وَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ بِمَا يُرْضِي رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
latinTransliteration: Wa tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli bimā yurḍī Rabbal-‘arshil-‘aẓīm
englishTranslation: And provision yourself for the day of departure with what pleases the Lord of the Great Throne.
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàkkal sa bopp yool bu rëy ngir bisu gàddaay ca sa Boroom.
wolofalAjamiScript: سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ بُ رِي نْجِرْ بِسُ جَدَّايْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ

arabicText: تُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ مِنْ قَبْلِ زَوَالِ الْعُمْرِ وَانْتِهَاءِ الْأَجَلِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Tub ilā Rabbika min qabli zawālil-‘umri wa-ntihā'il-ajal (5)
englishTranslation: Repent to your Lord before the end of lifespan and the arrival of your term. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom bala dundug di jex ak sa bisu dee di wàcc. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ بَلَ دُنْدُجْ دِ جِخْ اَكْ سَ بِسُ دِ دِ وَّسْ [5]

arabicText: وَلَا تَغْتَرَّ بِالْمَظَاهِرِ الْفَانِيَةِ فَالدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ [6]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā taghtarra bil-maẓāhiril-fāniyati fad-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥad (6)
englishTranslation: Do not be deceived by vanishing appearances, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Bul xool dundug àdduna buy seey, ndax kenn du fi yàgg sa sùnek. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: بُلْ خُولْ دُنْدُجْ اَدُّنَ بُيْ سِي نْدَخْ كِنْ دُ فِ يَقْ سَ سُنِكْ [6]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ خَوْفَكَ مِنَ الْجَلِيلِ حِصْنًا لَكَ مِنَ الْآثَامِ وَالْمَعَاصِي [7]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al khawfaka minal-Jalīli ḥiṣnan laka minal-āthāmi wal-ma‘āṣī (7)
englishTranslation: And make your fear of the Majestic a fortress for you against sins and transgressions. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Defal ragal Yàlla mu kawe ma ab gaar buy fadd say bàkkar. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِفَلْ رَجَلْ يَࣺلَّ مُ كَوِ مَ اَبْ جَارْ بُيْ فَدْ سَيْ بَࣺكَّرْ [7]

latinTransliteration: Wa tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli bimā yurḍī Rabbal-‘arshil-‘aẓīm (8)
englishTranslation: And provision yourself for the day of departure with what pleases the Lord of the Great Throne. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàkkal sa bopp yool bu rëy ngir bisu gàddaay ca sa Boroom. (Wers 8)

wolofalAjamiScript: سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ بُ رِي نْجِرْ بِسُ جَدَّايْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [28]

arabicText: تُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ مِنْ قَبْلِ زَوَالِ الْعُمْرِ وَانْتِهَاءِ الْأَجَلِ [29]
latinTransliteration: Tub ilā Rabbika min qabli zawālil-‘umri wa-ntihā'il-ajal (29)
englishTranslation: Repent to your Lord before the end of lifespan and the arrival of your term. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom bala dundug di jex ak sa bisu dee di wàcc. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ بَلَ دُنْدُجْ دِ جِخْ اَكْ سَ بِسُ دِ دِ وَّسْ [29]

arabicText: وَلَا تَغْتَرَّ بِالْمَظَاهِرِ الْفَانِيَةِ فَالدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ [30]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā taghtarra bil-maẓāhiril-fāniyati fad-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥad (30)
englishTranslation: Do not be deceived by vanishing appearances, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: Bul xool dundug àdduna buy seey, ndax kenn du fi yàgg sa sùnek. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: بُلْ خُولْ دُنْدُجْ اَدُّنَ بُيْ سِي نْدَخْ كِنْ دُ فِ يَقْ سَ سُنِكْ [30]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ خَوْفَكَ مِنَ الْجَلِيلِ حِصْنًا لَكَ مِنَ الْآثَامِ وَالْمَعَاصِي [31]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al khawfaka minal-Jalīli ḥiṣnan laka minal-āthāmi wal-ma‘āṣī (31)
englishTranslation: And make your fear of the Majestic a fortress for you against sins and transgressions. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: Defal ragal Yàlla mu kawe ma ab gaar buy fadd say bàkkar. (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِفَلْ رَجَلْ يَࣺلَّ مُ كَوِ مَ اَبْ جَارْ بُيْ فَدْ سَيْ بَࣺكَّرْ [31]

arabicText: وَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ بِمَا يُرْضِي رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ [32]
latinTransliteration: Wa tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli bimā yurḍī Rabbal-‘arshil-‘aẓīm (32)
englishTranslation: And provision yourself for the day of departure with what pleases the Lord of the Great Throne. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàkkal sa bopp yool bu rëy ngir bisu gàddaay ca sa Boroom. (Wers 32)
